## Checklist / 检查项

- [ ] The change stays within Audie's product boundary. / 改动保持在 Audie 产品边界内。
- [ ] No API keys, certificates, or local configuration are committed. / 未提交 API Key、证书或本机配置。
- [ ] Relevant frontend and Rust checks pass. / 相关前端和 Rust 检查已通过。
- [ ] User-visible changes are reflected in `RELEASE_NOTES.md`. / 用户可感知改动已更新 `RELEASE_NOTES.md`。
- [ ] Unrelated workspace changes were preserved. / 未覆盖无关的工作区改动。
